Constant
2 C 2 1111111111 a mismatch

Unary 0
2 I 0 1011000110 5 mismatch
2 I 0n 0100111001 5 mismatch

Unary 7
2 I 7 0010110010 4 mismatch
2 I 7n 1101001101 6 mismatch

Binary 07
2 AND 07 0010000010 2 mismatch
2 AND 07n 1101111101 8 mismatch
2 OR 07 1011110110 7 mismatch
2 OR 07n 0100001001 3 mismatch
2 XOR 07 1001110100 5 match 1/1
all match XOR 07

2 AND-NOT 07 1001000100 3 mismatch

2 I 7

0 I 5

2 XOR 07

7 I 5

Applying to 10011000
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 0
Output
0 I 5 = 0
1 I 6 = 0
2 XOR 07 = XOR(I 0,I 7) = XOR(1,0) = 1
3 I 1 = 0
4 I 2 = 0
5 I 3 = 1
6 I 4 = 1
7 I 5 = 0

\boxed{00100110}
